# Sportstalent

> Sport science strength & conditioning platform built for taekwondo athletes and the coaches who guide them. Periodized training plans, readiness tracking, injury rehab, nutrition, mental performance and competition reflection — in one place.

Sportstalent helps taekwondo clubs run their roster, build periodized 4–12 week programs, monitor athlete readiness, and turn each competition into a structured lesson. The platform is bilingual (Danish, English, Swedish, German, Norwegian, Arabic) and works offline in the gym.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Coaching platform overview for taekwondo clubs.
- [Programs](/programs): Periodized training programs — competition prep, general S&C, poomsae.
- [Methodology](/methodology): The sport science behind the periodization, readiness and rehab models.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Personal and Coach plans.
- [About](/about): Mission, vision and the team behind Sportstalent.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Help Center](/help): Feature guides and changelog.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create an athlete account.
- [Sign up as coach](/signup/coach): Create a coach account.
- [Taekwondo training program](/taekwondo-training-program): Sample sport-specific S&C plan.
- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
